description: TCEL Tenant-9 Integration/Security/Certification package (T9-009) - the platform meta-layer that completes the core-platform tier. Depends on Foundation. Several PL- controls (dependency validation, event idempotency, tenant isolation, AI execution separation) are things the ECARMF kernel ALREADY enforces structurally; carried here as declared TCEL controls for traceability, with the expressible ones enforced as rules. Entities: ECARMFCertificationResult, TCELPackageManifest. No domain agent. Does NOT re-declare RecordReceived.
name: TCEL Integration, Security & Certification

entities.description: The result of an ECARMF certification run over TCEL (T9-009 schema): domain scores, deficiencies, maturity level, grant/suspend outcome.
A registered TCEL package-manifest record for platform governance (T9-009 package-manifest.schema.json).

rules.name: Package dependency validation
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Platform Owner). Reject activation when declared dependencies are not satisfied.
rules.reasonTemplate: PL-001: package {packageId} activation rejected - declared dependencies not satisfied (Platform Owner).

rules.name: Tenant isolation
rules.reasonTemplate: PL-003: access denied - cross-tenant data access is prohibited (Security).

rules.name: Production deployment approval
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (DevOps). Require an approver for a production deployment.
rules.reasonTemplate: PL-004: production deployment rejected - no approver on file (DevOps).

rules.name: Signed artifacts
rules.reasonTemplate: PL-005: artifact rejected - it is not signed (Security).

rules.name: Secrets isolation
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Security). Deny an operation that would expose a secret.
rules.reasonTemplate: PL-008: denied - the operation would expose a secret (Security).

rules.name: AI execution separation
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (AI Governance). Deny an agent's attempt to take a material action.
rules.reasonTemplate: PL-009: denied - an AI agent may not take material actions; execution is separated from advice (AI Governance).

rules.name: Critical deficiency gate
rules.description: Governance/Critical (Certification Committee). Fail certification on a critical deficiency.
rules.reasonTemplate: PL-013: certification failed - a critical deficiency is present (Certification Committee).

rules.name: Model validation status
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Model Risk). Restrict use of a model with expired validation.
rules.reasonTemplate: PL-014: model use restricted - its validation has expired (Model Risk).

capabilities.name: TCEL Platform Integration & Certification
capabilities.description: Package/schema validation, tenant isolation, deployment and secrets security, connector health, DR, and the ECARMF certification framework for the TCEL tenant.

knowledgeAssets.title: TCEL Integration, Security & Certification Control Catalog (PL-001..020)
knowledgeAssets.summary: The 20 deterministic PL- controls. PL-001/003/004/005/008/009/013/014 are enforced as executable rules (several - dependency validation, tenant isolation, AI execution separation - the ECARMF kernel also enforces structurally); the remainder (schema compatibility, connector completeness, event idempotency, audit correlation and data lineage evidence, DR reconciliation, emergency-change and policy-control traceability, dashboard lineage, digital-twin separation, certification expiry) require evidence, lineage, or idempotency mechanisms beyond the declarative condition model and are carried for traceability.
knowledgeAssets.contentText: PL-001 Package dependency validation | Preventive | Reject activation | Critical | Platform Owner. PL-002 Schema compatibility | Preventive | Reject breaking deployment | Critical | Architecture. PL-003 Tenant isolation | Preventive | Deny cross-tenant access | Critical | Security. PL-004 Production deployment approval | Preventive | Require approver | Critical | DevOps. PL-005 Signed artifacts | Preventive | Reject unsigned artifact | Critical | Security. PL-006 Connector completeness | Detective | Open quality incident | Critical | Integration Owner. PL-007 Event idempotency | Preventive | Prevent duplicate effect | Critical | Architecture. PL-008 Secrets isolation | Preventive | Deny secret exposure | Critical | Security. PL-009 AI execution separation | Preventive | Deny material action | Critical | AI Governance. PL-010 Audit correlation | Evidence | Require correlation ID | High | Audit. PL-011 Data lineage | Evidence | Require source-to-output lineage | Critical | Data Governance. PL-012 DR reconciliation | Preventive | Do not declare restored | Critical | Resilience Owner. PL-013 Critical deficiency gate | Governance | Fail certification | Critical | Certification Committee. PL-014 Model validation status | Preventive | Restrict expired model | Critical | Model Risk. PL-015 Board pack evidence freeze | Preventive | Reject mutable pack | Critical | Corporate Secretary. PL-016 Emergency change review | Corrective | Require retrospective review | High | Change Manager. PL-017 Policy-control traceability | Evidence | Fail certification if missing | Critical | CCO/CRO. PL-018 Dashboard lineage | Evidence | Restrict uncertified metric | High | Data Governance. PL-019 Digital twin separation | Preventive | Block production mutation | Critical | Architecture. PL-020 Certification expiry/review | Governance | Reassess on material change | High | Certification Committee.
